sqlMap.select: select * from AreaOfSpecialityLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfSpecialityLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOSKey PercentageValue LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #AOSKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageValue# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOSKey from AreaOfSpecialityLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AreaOfSpecialityLW set
PercentageValue = #PercentageValue# PercentageValue = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfSpecialityLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#
delete from AreaOfSpecialityLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOSKey from AreaOfSpecialityLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOSKey, PercentageValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AreaOfSpecialityLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOSKey = #AOSKey#
